projects.title: AI-Powered Meeting Summarizer
projects.description: Full-stack enterprise application with a clean, responsive layout utilizing Gemini API to transcribe, summarize, and categorize workspace calls.

projects.title: Real-time Collaborative Board
projects.description: Multiplayer interactive canvas with custom room locks, vector toolkits, and server-authoritative state replication using WebSockets.

projects.title: Personal FinTech Dashboard
projects.description: Financial statistics suite with D3 charts tracking banking transaction streams, user goals, and dynamic tax forecasting engines.

skills.name: React / Next.js
skills.description: Modern React and Next.js frameworks for fast, reactive user interfaces and server-side applications.

skills.name: TypeScript
skills.description: Typed superset of JavaScript providing robust developer tooling and compiler safety.

skills.name: TailwindCSS
skills.description: Utility-first CSS framework for rapid design implementations with custom tokens.

skills.name: Spring Boot
skills.description: Enterprise-grade JVM framework for resilient microservices and RESTful API structures.

skills.name: Spring Security & JWT
skills.description: Token-based credentials architectures and role-based access control filters.

skills.name: MySQL / Hibernate
skills.description: Relational query optimizations, schema constraints, and Object-Relational mappings.

skills.name: Cloudinary
skills.description: Cloud media management API serving optimized, compressed assets dynamically.

skills.name: Docker & Kubernetes
skills.description: Container virtualization, service orchestrations, and automated deployment pipelines.

experiences.description: Designing cloud native templates, securing backend REST services with JWT integrations, and building high-fidelity workspace visualizers.
Implemented high-throughput microservices using Spring Boot and JPA/Hibernate. Managed database migrations for multi-tenant configurations.

messages.subject: Hiring Inquiry: Full-Stack Developer Role
messages.messageContent: Hi, I checked out your recent fintech project and loved the custom transaction reporting. We have an open staff role in our core team. Let me know if you would like to connect next Tuesday!

messages.subject: Collaboration Request on Zen App
messages.messageContent: A wonderful portfolio! I am looking for an architect to bootstrap the backend of our meditation log app using clean architecture guidelines. Your spring security expertise is exactly what we need.

settings.siteName: Alex Dev | Tech Architect & Systems builder
settings.siteDescription: The digital home of Alex Dev, showing core full-stack competencies, cloud engineering certifications, and interactive UI creations.
settings.metaKeywords: Alex Dev, software architect, Spring Boot developer, React specialist, cloud engineering, Java backend portfolio

resumes.title: Alex Dev - Principal Systems Engineer Resume
resumes.description: Principal Systems Engineer CV focusing on Full-Stack systems architecture, Kubernetes, and AI Integration with Gemini API.

resumes.title: Alex Dev - Full-Stack React Architect CV
resumes.description: Secondary draft focusing specifically on Frontend performance, Tailwind UI crafting, and edge rendering systems.

profile.title: Principal Systems Architect
profile.subtitle: Designing high-throughput distributed architectures & interactive visual frameworks.
profile.typingText: Principal Systems Architect, Full-Stack Pioneer, Clean Code Advocate
profile.shortBio: Hi, I'm Alex. I specialize in designing and engineering scalable microservice frameworks and high-performance React systems.
profile.aboutDescription: With over 8 years of professional enterprise engineering experience, I bridge the gap between rigorous back-end systems engineering and fluid, interactive modern interfaces. I'm passionate about automation, clean database designs, and optimal React state pipelines.
profile.name: Chandru  Mohan

achievements.title: Global AI Hackathon Champion
achievements.subtitle: 1st Place out of 450+ Teams Worldwide
achievements.shortDescription: Won first prize in the open-track AI automation and generative models division with an autonomous microservice orchestration platform.
achievements.description: Led a remote engineering team of 4 to design, build, and pitch an intelligent service orchestration engine. The solution utilized localized LLMs to auto-heal distributed REST endpoints, achieving a 98% reduction in mean time to repair (MTTR). Awarded Grand Prize by industry experts.

achievements.title: AWS Certified Solutions Architect - Professional
achievements.subtitle: Validation of advanced cloud architecture competencies
achievements.shortDescription: Acquired industry-standard certification demonstrating expertise in design, migration, and management of complex enterprise cloud deployments.
achievements.description: Successfully cleared the professional tier examination proving mastery in designing secure, resilient, and dynamically scalable multi-tier web architectures across complex hybrid-cloud environments with stringent high-availability constraints.

achievements.title: 1st Place - National Competitive Coding Championship
achievements.subtitle: Ranked #1 out of 2,500+ Top Collegiate Programmers
achievements.shortDescription: Achieved perfect score in record speed across advanced data structures, graph theory, and dynamic programming algorithms.
achievements.description: Competed in the annual algorithmic showdown, solving all 8 complex logic problems in under 92 minutes. Leveraged highly optimized C++ code and advanced algorithmic complexity techniques to secure the top spot in the leaderboards.
